display.purpose: Hero H1 only. The single oversized moment per page (text-6xl to 5.25rem), text-balance.

headline.purpose: Section H2 / block titles (text-4xl to text-5xl), font-semibold.

title.purpose: Card titles (font-semibold leading-none) and feature H3 (font-medium).

body.purpose: Paragraph copy at text-base; taglines step to text-lg; long-form uses prose prose-lg.

label.purpose: Nav links, card descriptions, captions in muted-foreground (text-sm).

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Buttons. A hairline lift so controls read as pressable.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Hero image plate, paired with ring-1 ring-background and inset-shadow-2xs.

shadows.name: header-glass
shadows.value: backdrop-filter: blur(64px); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--background) 50%, transparent); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border)
shadows.purpose: The fixed nav. The single sanctioned blur in the system.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Nav link color shifts and hover states.

motion.name: duration-icon
motion.purpose: Hamburger Menu/X cross-fade and rotate; CardDecorator hover.

motion.name: twinkle
motion.purpose: Star twinkle animation on Starfield dots. Gated behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference. Uses --d CSS custom property for per-star delay.

components.name: Button (default)
components.description: Primary shadcn button. Cosmic violet on light and dark; inverts foreground text to match.
components.css: .ds-btn { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn--default { background: oklch(0.52 0.20 285); color: oklch(0.99 0.005 285); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-btn--default:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.20 285 / 0.9); } .ds-btn--default:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 285 / 0.5); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Button (outline)
components.description: Bordered button on the canvas; hover fills with the indigo-tinted muted accent.
components.css: .ds-btn--outline { background: oklch(0.99 0.004 285); color: oklch(0.20 0.03 285); border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.012 285); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-btn--outline:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.02 285); } .ds-btn--outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 285 / 0.5); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Button (link)
components.description: Text-only action in violet; underline on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn--link { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.52 0.20 285); height: auto; padding: 0; text-underline-offset: 4px; } .ds-btn--link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-btn--link:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 285 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 0.25rem; }

components.name: CTA Pill (button-in-frame)
components.description: The hero/CTA signature: a violet primary button nested in a soft translucent frame for a double-edge.
components.css: .ds-cta-frame { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.20 0.03 285 / 0.1); border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.012 285); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 0.125rem; } .ds-cta-btn { border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; height: 2.5rem; font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Card
components.description: shadcn card on the cosmic-violet canvas: indigo-tinted border, violet-tinted card surface.
components.html:
Visual editing
Edit content in context, no rebuild.
Open the page in TinaCMS and click any field to edit it inline.
components.css: .ds-card { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0.002 285); color: oklch(0.20 0.03 285); border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.012 285); border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 1.5rem 0; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-card__header { padding: 0 1.5rem; display: grid; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-card__title { font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; } .ds-card__desc { color: oklch(0.48 0.03 285); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-card__content { padding: 0 1.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Feature Cell (CardDecorator)
components.description: Signature feature pattern: a dotted-grid square with radial fade centering a bordered icon tile.
components.html:
Composable blocks

Build pages from hero, features, stats, and CTA blocks.
components.css: .ds-feature { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: center; padding: 0 1.5rem 2rem; } .ds-deco { position: relative; margin: 0 auto; width: 9rem; height: 9rem; } .ds-deco__grid { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, oklch(0.20 0.03 285 / 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, oklch(0.20 0.03 285 / 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 24px 24px; } .ds-deco__fade { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent, oklch(1 0.002 285) 75%); } .ds-deco__tile { position: absolute; inset: 0; margin: auto; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: oklch(1 0.002 285); border-left: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.012 285); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.012 285); } .ds-feature__title { margin-top: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-feature__body { margin-top: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.48 0.03 285); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header nav inside the translucent glass bar; hover shifts foreground color. Right end has the ThemeToggle.
components.html:
Astro Starter
  • Blog
  • Docs
  • About
components.css: .ds-nav { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 3rem; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.012 285); background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.99 0.004 285) 50%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(64px); } .ds-nav__brand { font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav__link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.48 0.03 285); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: oklch(0.30 0.04 285); } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 285 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 0.25rem; }

components.name: ThemeToggle
components.description: size-9 icon button at the right end of the header nav. Sun icon in dark mode, moon in light. Persists to localStorage; no-flash init script in <head>.
components.html: <button id="theme-toggle" type="button" aria-label="Toggle color theme" class="ds-theme-toggle"><svg><!-- sun or moon icon --></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { display: inline-flex; width: 2.25rem; height: 2.25rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 0.375rem; color: oklch(0.48 0.03 285); transition: background-color 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.02 285); color: oklch(0.20 0.03 285); } .ds-theme-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 285 / 0.5); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Starfield
components.description: Decorative SVG star-dot backdrop. aria-hidden, pointer-events-none, currentColor-driven. Props: count (default 60), twinkle (boolean, default true). Twinkle gated behind prefers-reduced-motion. Applied to header (count 40, no twinkle), footer (count 50), hero (count 70).
components.html: <svg aria-hidden="true" class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 h-full w-full text-foreground/15"><!-- deterministic circles --></svg>

components.name: Aurora
components.description: Single soft radial gradient glow. aria-hidden, pointer-events-none. A point-source radial glow, NOT a linear sweep. Per the Aurora-Not-Sweep Rule.

components.name: ConstellationDivider
components.description: Five-node dot-and-polyline SVG seam between sections. aria-hidden. Used in Blocks.astro between every pair of blocks.
components.html: <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 400 20" class="mx-auto h-5 w-full max-w-sm text-muted-foreground/40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><!-- polyline + circles --></svg>

components.name: OrbitRings
components.description: Three overlapping ellipses at text-primary/20 behind the CTA section. aria-hidden, pointer-events-none.
components.html: <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 200 200" class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 m-auto h-full w-full text-primary/20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><!-- ellipses --></svg>

components.name: Planet
components.description: Circle + ring ellipse at fill-primary/15 / stroke-primary/30. Corner accent behind the Stats section. aria-hidden, pointer-events-none.
components.html: <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="pointer-events-none" fill="none"><!-- circle + ellipse --></svg>

components.name: LlamaNaut
components.description: Signature mascot SVG: a llama in a space helmet. aria-hidden. Rendered above the hero headline and as the 404 centerpiece. Sized via class prop (default size-40).
components.html: <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 120 120" fill="none" class="size-40"><!-- helmet, visor, llama silhouette --></svg>

components.name: Input
components.description: Bordered field with violet focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; width: 100%; max-width: 20rem; background: oklch(0.99 0.004 285); color: oklch(0.20 0.03 285); border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.012 285); border-radius: 0.5rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.48 0.03 285); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.52 0.20 285 / 0.5); outline-offset: 1px; border-color: oklch(0.52 0.20 285); }

narrative.overview: Picture a deep-night observatory: the dome is open, the telescope is pointed at something worth seeing, and everything around it stays dark and quiet so your eyes can adjust. That is the posture of this design system. Content is the celestial object under examination; the surrounding chrome is the dome — present, purposeful, and unlit. Personality arrives in the atmosphere and the seams: starfields drift behind the header and footer at 15% opacity, an aurora warms the hero with a single radial glow (never a linear sweep), ConstellationDividers stitch sections together, and a llama-naut mascot floats above the hero headline. All motifs are aria-hidden, pointer-events-none, and absolutely positioned by their consumer. The palette is cosmic violet — hue 285 across all neutrals, light and dark — with a saturated violet primary (oklch(0.52 0.20 285) light / oklch(0.70 0.16 285) dark) as the single accent. Dark mode is the canonical state; the light 'daybreak' surface (oklch(0.99 0.004 285)) is a clean alternative sharing the same violet logic. The single largest risk remains the generic AI / SaaS template; the defense is rationed violet, real content, and the Aurora-Not-Sweep Rule.
keyCharacteristics: Cosmic-violet accent (oklch(0.52 0.20 285) light / oklch(0.70 0.16 285) dark); all neutrals tinted to hue 285.
First-class light and dark themes, every token defined for both.
Starfield, aurora, and constellation atmospheric motifs — decorative, aria-hidden, currentColor-driven.
Llama-naut SVG mascot as a signature character on the hero and 404 page.
Content stays fully legible (WCAG AA) in both themes; motifs never reduce contrast or block editor targets.

rules.name: The Rationed Violet Rule
rules.body: Violet (--primary) is the single accent color. It should cover at most ~10% of any screen: links, one CTA button, active/focus states, and small decorative motifs. Do not use it as a background flood, a hero gradient wash, or a card tint. Restraint is what makes it feel like craft rather than a theme kit.

rules.name: The Indigo-Tint Rule
rules.body: All neutrals are tinted toward hue 285, never pure gray, black, or white. This includes surfaces, borders, muted text, and shadows. The tint is subtle (chroma 0.004–0.03) on lighter values and more perceptible on darker ones. Introducing a zero-chroma gray anywhere breaks the tonal coherence.

rules.name: The Theme-Parity Rule
rules.body: Every color token is defined for both light and dark. Never hardcode a value that only works in one theme; reference the semantic token (--primary, --muted-foreground) so it inverts automatically.

rules.name: The One-Big-Moment Rule
rules.body: Only the hero H1 is oversized (up to 5.25rem). Section headings stop at ~3rem. Don't let a second element compete with the hero for scale.

rules.name: The Measure Rule
rules.body: Section width is wide (max-w-7xl), but text blocks are constrained: taglines to max-w-2xl, feature copy inside max-w-5xl. Never run body text the full 1280px.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a 1px --border before a shadow. Cards, inputs, and sections separate by stroke; shadow is a small accent on top, never the primary divider.

rules.name: The Glass-Once Rule
rules.body: The only backdrop blur is the fixed header. Do not add glass panels, blurred cards, or frosted overlays elsewhere.

rules.name: The Aurora-Not-Sweep Rule
rules.body: The atmospheric glow is always a radial gradient (a single soft point source). Never a linear gradient swept across a hero or section background. A linear purple-to-magenta sweep is the generic SaaS anti-reference; the radial aurora is the intentional alternative.

dos: Do ration violet: use --primary for links, one CTA button, active/focus states, and small motifs only. Keep it to ~10% of screen area, per The Rationed Violet Rule.
Do keep content legible at WCAG AA in both light and dark themes. Body text, muted text, and interactive labels must all pass contrast. Motifs must not sit on top of readable text.
Do gate all animation (star twinkle, block entrance) behind @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference).
Do mark every decorative motif SVG aria-hidden='true' and pointer-events-none so it is invisible to assistive technology and cannot block editor interaction.
Do reference semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground, border-border) so elements invert correctly between light and dark, per The Theme-Parity Rule.
Do compose pages from the existing blocks at the max-w-7xl rhythm and separate sections with ConstellationDividers.
Do keep one oversized moment (the hero H1) per page and constrain text blocks to max-w-2xl / max-w-5xl.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) anywhere. It is unreadable on some display/OS combinations and is a visual marker of the generic SaaS template.

Don't use a flat purple→magenta linear gradient on a hero or section background. That is the exact anti-reference in PRODUCT.md. The aurora is a radial glow, not a linear sweep; the distinction is the whole point.
Don't add glassmorphism beyond the header. The Glass-Once Rule is explicit: one backdrop blur, one translucent panel, the fixed nav.
Don't let motifs reduce text contrast or block TinaCMS editor click targets. Motifs are atmosphere; content is the signal.
Don't use zero-chroma neutrals (pure oklch(L 0 0)). All surfaces and neutrals carry the 285 hue tint, per The Indigo-Tint Rule.
Don't hardcode #000/#fff or theme-specific values outside the token file; reference the semantic token so it inverts automatically.
Don't run body text the full 1280px width, and don't let any element other than the hero H1 compete for display scale.
Don't animate without a reduced-motion gate. Spring-bounce or long blur-in entrances are off by default; prefer a short ease-out.
